featureName: Security Hardening — Docker Binding, Auth Enforcement, Crypto Hygiene

executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md with problem statement, threat model for 6 attack surfaces, 7 actors/personas, 7 requirements with 23 Gherkin scenarios, outcome contract, non-functional requirements, success metrics, and 3 deferred improvement proposals. All findings SEC-001 through SEC-021 addressed.

Created design.md covering all 7 requirements (R-001 through R-007): Docker 127.0.0.1 port binding for 5 services, ML sidecar FastAPI auth dependency with hmac.compare_digest, webAuthMiddleware insertion in router.go Web UI group, httprate OAuth rate limiter (10 req/min/IP), NATS config file generation replacing --auth CLI arg, decrypt() fail-closed logic removing 3 plaintext fallback paths, startup auth warnings for core and ML sidecar. Config SST pipeline extended with host_bind_address and nats.conf generation. 20-row scenario-to-test mapping table. Zero open questions.

Created scopes.md with 3 scopes: (1) Docker port binding + NATS config file, (2) ML sidecar auth + Web UI auth + OAuth rate limiting, (3) Decrypt fail-closed + startup auth warning. Created report.md and uservalidation.md templates.

Implemented all 3 scopes. Scope 1: Bound all 5 Docker service ports to 127.0.0.1, replaced NATS --auth CLI arg with config file mount, added host_bind_address to SST pipeline, generated nats.conf. Scope 2: Created ml/app/auth.py with verify_auth() FastAPI dependency using hmac.compare_digest, applied webAuthMiddleware to Web UI routes, added httprate.LimitByIP(10, 1min) to OAuth start endpoint, added go-chi/httprate dependency. Scope 3: Changed decrypt() to return errors on all 3 failure paths when encKey is non-nil, added startup WARN log for empty auth_token in cmd/core/main.go and ml/app/main.py. Updated 1 existing test (PlaintextFallback → FailClosed) and added 4 new Go tests + 7 new Python tests. All 51 unit tests pass (Go + Python).
